creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
Mumble has been broken on 9+ for a while with amd64, failing with a cryptic error message.

Fix: Stop building debug version of plugins; this is a workaround but the generated package is fine.

	Upstream will need chasing about this; I'm prepared to help however I can.
How-To-Repeat: 	on a 9/amd64 machine: make -DTRY_BROKEN -C /usr/ports/audio/mumble
